project_type: Next.js 15 App Router frontend with Three.js particle entity, Framer Motion animations, WebSocket chat, and Google OAuth
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install to ensure deps installed. 2. pnpm build to verify no TypeScript/build errors. 3. pnpm lint to check linting.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. No backend running so no integration tests possible. Frontend-only rebuild. DO NOT modify: backend/, mcp-servers/, shared/, hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts, middleware.ts, components/Providers.tsx, components/entity/ directory
contribution_requirements: Keep existing API integrations working (same function signatures in lib/api.ts). Auth flow unchanged (NextAuth Google OAuth). Same Next.js app router structure.
key_patterns: - Uses framer-motion for all animations. - Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens in tailwind.config.ts. - CSS variables in globals.css for theming. - Glass morphism utilities (.glass, .glass-strong). - Inter font for UI, JetBrains Mono for code. - All pages are client components using useSession for auth. - Dashboard checks onboarding status and redirects. - Chat uses WebSocket via useChatSocket hook. - Components organized by feature (chat/, drawers/, layout/, entity/, settings/, ui/, voice/)
directory_structure: frontend/ is the workspace root. app/ has page routes (page.tsx = landing, dashboard/page.tsx, onboarding/page.tsx, api/auth/). components/ has feature subdirs. hooks/ has useChatSocket.ts. lib/ has api.ts, ws.ts, voice.ts. public/ has favicon. Types in types/ dir.
